romantic: Write a short love poem and read it aloud.
Whisper three things you love about your partner.
Give your partner a slow, deliberate back rub for two minutes.
Trace a heart on your partner's palm with your finger.
Let your partner close their eyes and describe your favorite memory together.
Kiss each knuckle of your partner's hand one by one.
Write a tiny love note and hide it somewhere your partner will find later.
Hold your partner's gaze without speaking for 30 seconds.
Dance with your partner to a slow song in the middle of the room.
Give your partner a compliment about something they may not realize about themselves.
Trace the outline of your partner's lips with your fingertip.
Let your partner rest their head in your lap while you stroke their hair.
Kiss your partner on the spot they love most.
Whisper a promise for your future together.
Hold both of your partner's hands and tell them how they make you feel.
Give your partner a foot massage while telling them one thing you love about them.
Press your forehead against your partner's and breathe together for ten breaths.
Let your partner close their eyes and kiss them somewhere unexpected but gentle.
Say one thing you're grateful for about your relationship every day for the next week — start now.
Cradle your partner's face in your hands and kiss them slowly.
playful: Do your best celebrity impression until your partner guesses who it is.
Let your partner draw a mustache on your face with a washable marker.
Speak in an accent for the next three rounds.
Let your partner tickle you for ten seconds without trying to stop them.
Perform a dramatic slow-motion replay of something that happened today.
Let your partner style your hair into something ridiculous and wear it for one round.
Say everything as a question until your next turn.
Dance to a song of your partner's choice with zero shame.
Let your partner give you a silly dare of their choice — nothing too mean.
Recreate a famous movie scene with your partner and perform it.
Let your partner balance an object on your head while you try to hold still.
Sing the last thing you said instead of speaking it.
Do your best runway walk across the room and back.
Let your partner come up with a nickname for you that you must use for the rest of the session.
Act out an animal and let your partner guess what it is.
Speak only in rhymes until your next turn.
Let your partner give you a temporary tattoo somewhere visible.
Mimic something your partner does often — lovingly, not meanly.
Put on an item of clothing backward and wear it for the rest of the game.
Do your best robot dance for 20 seconds while your partner rates your form.
spicy: Blindfold your partner and use only your lips to explore their neck and collarbone.
Trace a path from your partner's ear down to their hip using only your tongue.
Whisper your most secret fantasy into your partner's ear.
Let your partner sit on your lap while you whisper what you want to do to them later.
Kiss your way from your partner's shoulder down to their fingertips.
Let your partner remove one item of your clothing using only their teeth.
Spend one full minute kissing your partner without using your hands.
Let your partner tie your hands gently with something soft and take control for two minutes.
Draw a slow line with an ice cube down your partner's chest or back.
Grind against your partner slowly to music for 30 seconds.
Whisper the dirtiest thing that comes to mind — no filtering.
Let your partner blindfold you and tease you with feather-light touches for one minute.
Kiss your partner somewhere they didn't expect — but keep it appropriate for now.
Let your partner guide your hand to somewhere they want to be touched.
Bite your lip while looking your partner up and down slowly.
Let your partner hover just close enough to feel your breath without touching — for 20 seconds.
Trace your partner's body under their clothes with just your fingertips.
Tell your partner exactly what you'd do if you were alone right now with no limits.
Let your partner sit on your lap facing you and pull you into a deep kiss.
Kiss your partner's neck while your hand rests on their inner thigh.
